title: cineraria visianiana
intro: Cineraria visianiana, also known as the Cape marigold or silver ragwort, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Cineraria visianiana include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Cineraria visianiana include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
